name: qa_e2e_playwright
description: Playwright-based E2E testing for CI/CD — automated spec files, page objects, visual regression, and pipeline integration. For manual testing inside Antigravity use $qa_browser_testing.
default_prompt: Use $qa_e2e_playwright when the task matches the "E2E Playwright (CI/CD Automated)" skill.
triggers: Playwright-based E2E testing for CI/CD — automated spec files, page objects, visual regression, and pipeline integration
